question: Which of the following statements correctly explains the purpose of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 in India ?

options.1: It was enacted to promote industrial growth without any environmental restrictions.
options.2: It focuses only on the protection of wildlife species and national parks.
options.3: It provides a framework for protecting and improving the environment and controlling all forms of pollution.
options.4: It was introduced to regulate forest revenue and timber trade.

question: How can Artificial Intelligence (AI), Quantum Computing and Data Science together improve environmental monitoring and management ?

options.1: By ignoring environmental data and focusing only on industrial profits
options.2: By analysing large datasets to predict pollution levels, optimize resource use and simulate complex climate models.
options.3: By replacing traditional environmental policies with computer automation
options.4: By promoting random deforestation to test satellite imagery accuracy
